daily.today_energy: Your practical vibes are meeting creative sparks today. There's this grounded yet imaginative energy flowing through—lean into it. Trust the small intuitive nudges you're getting; they're pointing you somewhere real.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, your partner might surprise you with something thoughtful. Single? Someone's noticing your quiet confidence. Either way, vulnerability looks good on you rn. Let people see the softer side beneath that composed exterior.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is your superpower today. That project or task you've been sitting on? Now's the moment to move it forward with intention. Your efforts are building something solid—even if the results aren't instant, the momentum matters.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding activities—think long walks, stretching, or anything that keeps you present. Energy flows where attention goes. Tune into what actually feels restorative for you, not what you think should work. Rest isn't laziness.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to soften your edges, Cap. You've been grinding hard, and the universe is gently suggesting it's time to let people in. Trust the process and your intuition—they're vibing together rn.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet nothings in your direction. Whether you're coupled up or solo, this is your moment to be vulnerable. Real connections happen when you drop the armor. Let someone see the softer version of you.
weekly.career: Your hard work is about to get noticed, but here's the tea: the breakthrough comes from collaboration, not isolation. Share your ideas, ask for input, and watch how doors start opening. You've got the skills—now leverage your network.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more rest and less hustle. This week, prioritize activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Whether it's yoga, long walks, or just sleeping in, your energy will thank you for the intentional care.
